AI Research Wire

Purpose: AI research notes, news synthesis, paper-style essays, and research digests.

Canonical source: https://github.com/agilentic/ai-research-wire

Articles:
- AI Research Wire Manifesto: https://agilentic.github.io/ai-research-wire/articles/ai-research-wire-manifesto/
- Frontier Model Release Watch: https://agilentic.github.io/ai-research-wire/articles/frontier-model-release-watch/
- From Paper to Product: The Agentic Research Loop: https://agilentic.github.io/ai-research-wire/articles/paper-to-product-loop/
